channel.title: Mathematics on Paula Fonte
channel.description: Recent content in Mathematics on Paula Fonte

item.title: Predictive analytics — Demand forecasting and anomaly detection
item.description: Predictive models combining weather, sensor, and business signals, with a mathematical approach applied to real operational questions.

item.title: From mathematician to data engineer: why that path makes sense
item.description: How a mathematical background prepared me to solve complex data problems, and why that combination remains valuable in the market.
